name: daily_stoic_ai_digest
description: Generates a daily Stoic reflection combined with AI news.

input.content: Select a meaningful passage from Epictetus, Seneca, or Marcus Aurelius. Provide the passage and a one-sentence explanation of its theme.
Using Tavily (API key provided separately), identify 3 important AI news items from the last 24 hours. Summarize each in 2–3 sentences. Do not fabricate sources.
Combine the Stoic passage and the AI news summaries into a single 400–600 word reflection in a classical, contemplative tone. End with a concise takeaway.
